掌握最常用的見面與道別用語。: Master the most common greetings and farewells.
依據時間不同使用對應的打招呼用語。: Use appropriate greetings based on the time of day.
能用日文說出自己的身分，並詢問對方。: State your identity in Japanese and ask others.
學會指稱物品並詢問名稱。: Learn to point to objects and ask their names.
能在實體空間中詢問與指出地點。: Ask for and point out locations in physical space.
學會日文基本數字與報時。: Learn basic Japanese numbers and tell time.
能在餐廳點餐或商店詢問價格。: Order food at restaurants or ask prices at stores.
描述習慣性的動作或即將要做的事。: Describe habitual actions or things you are about to do.
學會約別人一起做某件事。: Learn to invite others to do something together.
描述昨天或以前發生的事情。: Describe what happened yesterday or in the past.
表達自己想要的東西或想做的事。: Express what you want or want to do.
學會基本的電話接聽與留言說法。: Learn basic phone answering and leaving messages.
客氣地請別人幫忙或詢問可不可以做某事。: Politely ask for help or permission to do something.
描述天氣或事物的狀態改變。: Describe the weather or changes in states of things.
學會比較兩樣事物並表達偏好。: Learn to compare two things and express preference.
A跟B哪個比較...？: Between A and B, which one is more...?
分享做過的事並給予他人建議。: Share past experiences and give advice.
使用 Be 動詞描述狀態與身分。: Use Be verbs to describe states and identities.
詢問廁所或辦公室在哪裡。: Ask where the restroom or office is.
詢問價格與基本點餐。: Ask for prices and basic ordering.
看懂時間，並描述每天固定行程。: Understand time and describe daily routines.
表達自己喜歡或討厭的事物。: Express what you like or dislike.
說明自己會做什麼，以及請別人幫忙。: Explain what you can do and ask for help.
描述昨天去哪裡或做了什麼。: Describe where you went or what you did yesterday.
說明即將到來的週末或明天的計畫。: Explain plans for the upcoming weekend or tomorrow.
你打算做什麼？: What are you going to do?
學會基本的英文電話對答與留言。: Learn basic English phone conversations and leaving messages.
有禮貌地提出請求或詢問是否可以做某事。: Politely make requests or ask if you can do something.
比較兩種事物並表達其差異。: Compare two things and express their differences.
對別人的狀況給予簡單的建議。: Give simple advice on others' situations.
描述過去的經驗並表達自己的感覺。: Describe past experiences and express feelings.
撰寫軟體需求信件，說明系統更新的具體規格。: Write an email outlining the specific requirements for the system update.
詢問軟體功能，了解系統操作方式與細節。: Inquire about software features to understand system operations and details.
向主管匯報目前 IT 專案的進度與遭遇的阻礙。: Report the current IT project progress and obstacles to the manager.
與開發團隊討論軟體項目的新功能與修改需求。: Discuss new features and modification requirements with the dev team.
與外國團隊進行視訊會議，討論技術與合作。: Have a video conference with a foreign team to discuss tech and collaboration.
探討系統架構設計與基礎資訊安全防護措施。: Discuss system architecture design and basic information security measures.
向客戶進行基本的產品開場與介紹。: Give a basic product opening and introduction to the customer.
詢問並了解客戶的基本業務痛點與需求。: Ask and understand the customer's basic business pain points and needs.
應對並處理客戶覺得報價過高的疑慮。: Handle and address customer concerns about high quotes.
向客戶即時展示產品的實際操作與各項優勢。: Show the customer a live demo of the product and its advantages.
與客戶針對復雜合約與各項條款細節進行談判。: Negotiate complex contracts and terms details with the customer.
討論並確立未來長期的策略合作框架。: Discuss and establish a long-term strategic partnership framework.
與求職者聯絡並確認面試的時間安排。: Contact the candidate and confirm the interview schedule.
向新進員工說明公司的基本福利與制度。: Explain basic company benefits and policies to new employees.
擔任面試官，針對初階職缺進行面試。: Act as an interviewer for a junior position.
規劃並討論新進員工的入職培訓安排。: Plan and discuss onboarding arrangements for new employees.
調解員工之間或勞資雙方的衝突。: Mediate conflicts between employees or labor-management.
制定並討論公司的人才留任與裁撤策略。: Formulate and discuss the company's talent retention and layoff strategy.
確保合約草案的簽署日期與相關流程。: Ensure the draft contract signing date and related processes.
針對合約中的陌生法律術語詢問清晰定義。: Ask for clear definitions of unfamiliar legal terms in the contract.
仔細審核服務條款 (TOS) 的具體內容與責任歸屬。: Carefully review the TOS details and liabilities.
討論並確認保密協議中的覆蓋範圍。: Discuss and confirm the coverage of the NDA.
針對違約事項進行法律辯論: Legal Debate on Breach of Contract
針對對方違約的行為進行法律上的辯論。: Debate legally regarding the other party's breach of contract.
討論如何在多國框架下保護公司的知識產權。: Discuss how to protect company IP under a multinational framework.
填寫並提交個人的商務差旅費用報支單。: Fill out and submit personal business travel expense reports.
與廠商或客戶核對當期的發票金額與帳款。: Verify current invoice amounts and accounts with vendors or customers.
向管理層解釋今年度部門預算超支的原因。: Explain the reasons for the department's budget overrun to management.
解讀並分析本季的損益表與現金流量表。: Interpret and analyze this quarter's income and cash flow statements.
針對潛在的企業併購標的進行資產與商譽估值。: Conduct asset and goodwill valuation for potential M&A targets.
發表新投資案的潛在風險與回報評估報告。: Present potential risks and return evaluations for a new investment.
在新學期詢問同學或助教確切的上課地點。: Ask classmates or TAs for the exact classroom location in the new semester.
與助教確認期中作業的最後繳交期限。: Confirm the midterm assignment deadline with the TA.
在辦公時間向教授請益並討論研究主題方向。: Consult the professor during office hours about research topics.
在課堂分組中發表意見，參與議題討論。: Express opinions and participate in class group discussions.
在全班面前進行 15 分鐘的獨立學術簡報。: Give an independent 15-minute academic presentation to the class.
針對課堂上具備爭議的社會議題進行辯論。: Debate controversial social issues in class.
詢問入社方式: Ask How to Join a Club
在社團博覽會上詢問如何加入感興趣的社團。: Ask how to join a club at the club fair.
向社團的新朋友簡單分享自己的興趣與愛好。: Briefly share your hobbies with new club friends.
與幹部共同規劃新學期的迎新與招生宣傳。: Plan new semester recruitment with club officers.
會議討論並決定各項社團活動的經費預算。: Discuss and decide on the budget for club events.
在社員大會上發表演說，競選重要幹部。: Give a speech to run for a key officer position in the club assembly.
調解社團成員因為籌辦活動而產生的摩擦。: Mediate conflicts among members organizing events.
寫信詢問系辦關於入學所需的語言與成績門檻。: Email the department asking about language and grade requirements.
向推薦人確認推薦信的上傳方式與格式要求。: Confirm upload method and format with the recommender.
與顧問或朋友口頭練習陳述自己的申請動機。: Orally practice your application motives with an advisor or friend.
考量自身條件，討論並決定最終要申請的校系清單。: Discuss and decide on the final school list based on your profile.
參加高強度的模擬面試，回答各式尖銳問題。: Participate in a rigorous mock interview and answer tough questions.
針對獎學金的核發結果，提出並爭取更多補助。: Appeal the scholarship decision to seek more funding.
向圖書館員或學長姐請教文獻檢索的技巧。: Ask librarians or seniors for literature search tips.
簡單地向他人解釋為何選擇這個論文題目。: Briefly explain to others why you chose this thesis topic.
在例會中向教授匯報本週的研究進展。: Report this week's research progress during the regular meeting.
清楚地說明實驗得出的數據所代表的意義。: Clearly explain the meaning of the experimental data obtained.
正式在口試委員面前進行論文發表與問題答辯。: Formally present your thesis and defend it before the committee.
深刻剖析並探討該研究所採用方法的限制。: Deeply analyze and discuss the limitations of the research methodology.
向房東報修漏水: Report a Leak to the Landlord
打電話給房東，說明住處漏水的狀況並要求維修。: Call the landlord to report a leak and request repairs.
在家具行詢問沙發或衣櫃的售價與運送服務。: Ask about sofa/wardrobe prices and delivery services at a store.
與室友討論並分配掃地、倒垃圾等日常家務。: Discuss and assign daily chores like sweeping and trash with roommates.
與設計師或家人討論預期打造的室內裝潢風格。: Discuss the desired interior design style with a designer or family.
嘗試向仲介或房東殺價，爭取更好的租賃條件。: Try to haggle with the agent or landlord for better lease terms.
以理性且不失禮的態度，請鄰居晚上降低音量。: Politely and rationally ask neighbors to turn down the volume at night.
在服飾店詢問店員是否有其他尺寸或顏色。: Ask a store clerk if they have other sizes or colors.
在收銀台確認購買明細與最終結帳總額。: Confirm purchase details and the final total at the checkout counter.
攜帶發票至服務台，辦理尺寸不合的退換貨。: Bring your receipt to the service desk to exchange the wrong size.
購買電子產品時，詳細詢問保固年限與涵蓋範圍。: Ask in detail about the warranty period and coverage for electronics.
針對買到的嚴重瑕疵品，強力要求退款甚至賠償。: Strongly demand a refund or compensation for severely defective goods.
仔細比較兩款高階相機或電腦的詳細規格差異。: Carefully compare the detailed specs of two high-end cameras or PCs.
在餐廳看著菜單，向服務生點選主餐與飲料。: Look at the menu and order main courses and drinks from the waiter.
詢問餐廳是否有隱藏菜單或是今日主廚特餐。: Ask the restaurant about secret menus or today's chef specials.
向服務生詳細說明自己對花生或海鮮的過敏。: Explain in detail to the waiter your allergy to peanuts or seafood.
打電話預約假日期熱門時段的餐廳座位。: Call to reserve a table at a popular restaurant during peak hours.
向餐廳經理反應上菜過慢且服務態度不佳的問題。: Complain to the manager about slow serving and bad service attitude.
以口頭方式分享針對某間米其林餐廳的深度評價。: Verbally share an in-depth review of a Michelin-starred restaurant.
向朋友介紹自己養的寵物的品種與可愛特徵。: Introduce your pet's breed and cute features to a friend.
在寵物用品店挑選適合家裡毛小孩的乾糧或罐頭。: Choose suitable dry food or canned food at a pet store.
帶寵物看診，並清楚描述寵物這幾天的異常症狀。: Take your pet to the vet and describe its abnormal symptoms.
與訓犬師交流如何改善狗狗在家亂咬東西的習慣。: Discuss how to stop your dog from biting things with a trainer.
詳細詢問帶著寵物出國定居所需的各項檢疫手續。: Inquire about quarantine procedures for moving abroad with your pet.
探討寵物分離焦慮症的成因與心理治療方法。: Explore causes and psychological treatments for pet separation anxiety.
向醫生或護士指出自己感到疼痛不適的身體部位。: Point out the painful body parts to a doctor or nurse.
向藥劑師描述感冒症狀並購買適合的成藥。: Describe your cold symptoms to a pharmacist and buy OTC meds.
向醫生詢問檢查結果: Ask the Doctor About Test Results
回診時詢問前幾天所做的血液或X光檢查結果。: Ask about blood or X-ray results from a few days ago during a visit.
打電話到醫院預約特定醫生的專科門診時段。: Call the hospital to book an appointment with a specific specialist.
與醫生深入探討糖尿病或高血壓的長期控制方案。: Discuss long-term control plans for diabetes or high blood pressure.
在醫生的解釋下，理解手術風險並簽署同意書。: Understand the surgery risks and sign the consent form with the doctor.
在機場櫃檯辦理登機報到與行李托運。: Check in and drop off luggage at the airport counter.
在街頭向路人詢問通往知名觀光景點的路線。: Ask a passerby for directions to famous tourist attractions.
到達飯店卻發現沒有房間，與櫃檯交涉解決方案。: Negotiate a solution with the front desk when arriving at an overbooked hotel.
與旅伴共同討論並安排為期一週的當地自由行行程。: Discuss and arrange a 1-week independent trip with your travel buddy.
在國外遺失護照，急需向當地警察局與大使館求助。: Seek emergency help from police and embassy for a lost passport abroad.
以當地導遊的身份，向遊客深度解說名勝古蹟的歷史。: Explain the history of historical sites in-depth as a local guide.
在聯誼或相親網上首次與對方見面，自我介紹。: Introduce yourself on a first date from a matchmaking site.
大方且體面地稱讚對方的穿搭品味。: Generously and decently compliment the other person's fashion taste.
與曖昧對象分享彼此的人生價值觀與未來藍圖。: Share life values and future blueprints with a romantic interest.
在約會無話可說時，巧妙開啟新話題化解尷尬。: Cleverly start a new topic to break the awkward silence on a date.
與伴侶嚴肅討論兩人未來的關係進展與承諾。: Seriously discuss future relationship progress and commitments with a partner.
理性處理兩人在約會行程或觀念上的意見不合。: Rationally handle disagreements on date itineraries or concepts.
在聖誕節或新年向朋友致上溫馨的節日祝賀。: Send warm holiday greetings to friends for Christmas or New Year.
向外國友人詢問他們慶祝特定節日的傳統習俗。: Ask foreign friends about their traditional ways of celebrating holidays.
熱情邀請朋友來參加週末的萬聖節變裝派對。: Enthusiastically invite friends to a weekend Halloween costume party.
在派對上進行交換禮物環節時的互動與感謝。: Interact and say thanks during the gift exchange segment at a party.
向不熟悉的人深入講解農曆新年或感恩節的起源。: Deeply explain the origins of Lunar New Year or Thanksgiving to others.
與籌備團隊討論大型跨年晚會的流程與緊急備案。: Discuss NYE gala workflows and contingency plans with the team.
在派對上與不太熟的人進行輕鬆的非正式寒暄。: Engage in light, informal small talk with acquaintances at a party.
擔任中間人，介紹互相不認識的兩位朋友認識。: Act as a middleman and introduce two friends who don't know each other.
在社交場合中，得體地切入並加入一群人的談話。: Appropriately step in and join a group's conversation at a social event.
與很久沒見的老朋友分享最近的生活變化。: Share recent life changes with an old friend you haven't seen in a while.
在多人聚會中，引導並主持大家熱烈討論熱門話題。: Guide and lead a lively discussion on trending topics in a gathering.
以不傷感情的方式，優雅拒絕自己不想去的聚會。: Gracefully decline a party you don't want to attend without hurting feelings.
詢問附近健身房的收費方案與會員福利。: Ask about pricing plans and member benefits at a nearby gym.
邀約朋友打球: Invite a Friend to Play Sports
打電話邀請朋友週末一起去打籃球或網球。: Call and invite a friend to play basketball or tennis over the weekend.
向對該項運動不熟的朋友解釋基本比賽規則。: Explain basic rules to a friend unfamiliar with the sport.
向教練或防護員說明自己在運動時拉傷的部位。: Explain to a coach or trainer where you pulled a muscle during sports.
在觀看冠亞軍賽時，與同好深入分析兩隊的戰術配備。: Deeply analyze tactics of both teams with fans during the finals.
探討並評論某位知名球星近期的低潮與職業素養。: Discuss and comment on a famous star's recent slump and professionalism.
向朋友簡述今天早上看到的一則突發國際新聞。: Brief a friend on a breaking international news story seen this morning.
針對該新聞事件，詢問朋友的個人觀點與感受。: Ask for a friend's personal viewpoint and feelings about the news event.
探討日益嚴重的全球暖化現狀與減碳政策。: Discuss the worsening global warming situation and carbon reduction policies.
討論美國聯準會升降息對全球經濟的可能影響。: Discuss the potential impact of Fed interest rate changes on the economy.
深入剖析牽涉多方利益的敏感地緣政治衝突。: Deeply analyze sensitive geopolitical conflicts involving multiple interests.
針對兩國間的關稅戰與貿易保護主義進行辯論。: Debate tariff wars and trade protectionism between two countries.
向同事推薦週末剛看完的一部精彩院線電影。: Recommend a great movie you just watched over the weekend to a colleague.
分享自己最喜歡的歌手或演員，並說明喜歡的原因。: Share your favorite singer or actor and explain why you like them.
與朋友熱烈討論當紅影集上一季結尾的驚人轉折。: Enthusiastically discuss a shocking finale twist of a hit TV show with a friend.
討論為何某支 TikTok 舞蹈短影音會突然爆紅。: Discuss why a certain TikTok dance video suddenly went viral.
剖析大量散佈的迷因文化如何潛移默化影響大眾心理。: Analyze how meme culture subtly influences public psychology.
以專業的角度，對展場中的抽象後現代藝術發表見解。: Express professional views on abstract postmodern art at an exhibition.
向家人示範並介紹一款非常實用的手機新軟體。: Demonstrate and introduce a very useful new phone app to your family.
聊聊剛發佈的旗艦級手機搭載的各項新技術。: Chat about the new tech equipped in a recently released flagship phone.
分享使用 ChatGPT 後對日常工作帶來的改變。: Share the changes brought to daily work after using ChatGPT.
探討 VR 和 AR 未來在娛樂與教育產業的應用潛力。: Explore the potential of VR/AR in the future of entertainment and education.
針對自駕車在不可避免車禍時的道德抉擇進行激辯。: Debate moral choices of autonomous vehicles in unavoidable accidents.
講述去中心化金融 (DeFi) 將會如何改變傳統銀行業。: Discuss how decentralized finance (DeFi) will change traditional banking.

一群喜愛外語學習的科技人: A group of tech enthusiasts who love learning languages
我們的初衷：打破傳統語言學習的框架: Our Original Intention: Breaking the Framework of Traditional Language Learning
學習一門外語，最困難的往往不是背誦成千上萬的單字，或是熟記繁雜的文法規則，而是缺: Learning a foreign language, the most difficult part is often not memorizing thousands of words or complex grammar rules, but the lack of a "real, immersive, and stress-free conversation environment".
我們是一群熱愛語言學習與鑽研最新科技的開發者。在過去的學習經驗中，我們深刻體會到: We are a group of developers who love language learning and the latest technology. In our past learning experiences, we deeply realized that Asian students generally perform excellently in reading and writing, but when it comes to speaking, they often face pain points such as "fear of making mistakes", "inability to find practice partners", or "expensive tutoring fees". These obstacles keep many people in the "mute foreign language" stage, unable to convert years of learning into actual communication skills. Thus, Multi-Lang Coach was born.
AI 驅動的學習革命：專屬您的 24 小時教練: AI-Driven Learning Revolution: Your Exclusive 24-Hour Coach
透過最新一代的生成式 AI 技術與大數據語料庫，我們打造了這個 24 小時隨時待: Through the latest generation of generative AI technology and big data corpora, we have built this intelligent voice coach available 24 hours a day. It can not only simulate various real scenarios from "high-level business negotiations", "academic paper discussions" to "daily outing orders", but also instantly transcribe and correct your pronunciation and grammar with high patience and professionalism.
在傳統的家教課程中，學生往往會因為頻繁被糾正而感到氣餒；但在這裡，您面對的是一位: In traditional tutoring sessions, students often feel discouraged by frequent corrections; but here, you face a virtual coach with no critical eye and always patient guidance. It can customize exclusive dialogue scripts based on your job needs (e.g., IT engineer, sales representative) and provide the most native vocabulary suggestions that fit local cultural habits, multiplying your learning efficiency.
未來的願景：讓語言不再是溝通的障礙: Future Vision: Making Language No Longer a Barrier to Communication
語言是探索世界、理解不同文化的橋樑。我們的團隊致力於持續優化 AI 語言模型的推: Language is a bridge to explore the world and understand different cultures. Our team is committed to continuously optimizing the inference capabilities of AI language models and continuously expanding the learning scenario library. We hope that through the power of technology, breaking the boundaries of geography and resources, everyone—no matter where they are, no matter how much learning budget they have—can have a stress-free, highly interactive immersive language practice experience. We believe that the moment you speak confidently, opportunities around the world will open up for you.

無論您是遇到了技術問題、有新的功能建議，或是希望與我們進行任何問題反映或建議，我: Whether you have encountered a technical issue, have new feature suggestions, or wish to provide any feedback or suggestions, we welcome your emails.
一般情況下，我們的團隊會儘快回覆您的來信。謝謝您的支持！: Generally, our team will reply to your email as soon as possible. Thank you for your support!
保護您的個人資料與隱私是我們的首要任務: Protecting your personal data and privacy is our top priority
我們僅收集您在使用本服務時所需的最低限度資料。您的語音輸入與對話紀錄僅用於提供即: We only collect the minimum data required when you use this service. Your voice inputs and conversation records are solely used to provide real-time AI language correction and feedback services. We will not sell these personal conversation records to any third party. Your learning progress (such as vocabulary list, pattern records) will be securely stored to ensure you can continue your learning experience across devices.
本網站使用 Cookies 及類似追蹤技術來維持您的登入狀態、記住您的偏好設定（: This website uses Cookies and similar tracking technologies to maintain your login status, remember your preferences (such as dark/light themes, learning language), and help us analyze website traffic to improve user experience. You can refuse Cookies through your browser settings at any time, but this may cause some features of the website to not function properly.
本網站為了維持營運，可能有使用 Google AdSense 來放送廣告。Goo: To maintain operations, this website may use Google AdSense to serve ads. Google and third-party vendors use Cookies to serve relevant ads based on your past visits to this or other websites. Users can go to Google's "Ad Settings" to disable personalized ads. We comply with Google AdSense policies to ensure we do not use improper means to click on ads or provide violating content.
我們保留隨時修改本隱私權政策的權利。重大變更將會透過網站公告通知使用者。繼續使用: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Major changes will be notified to users through website announcements. Continuing to use this service means you agree to the latest version of the privacy policy.

mockSystemNote: (💡 [System Note] This is a static demo response. To experience dynamic AI conversations, please refer to the User Guide to easily get your **FREE** Gemini API key!)
mock_exp_by_until: 'By' is used to indicate a deadline, while 'until' is used to indicate a continuous period.
mock_exp_report_ing: For ongoing actions, please use the present continuous form 'reporting'.
mock_trans_progress: Great, I understand the progress status. However, please make sure you detail any potential blockers. Also, I noticed a minor grammar mistake.
mock_trans_database: That sounds like a backend infrastructure issue. When explaining to a non-technical boss or client, you can simplify it. For example, you can say 'We are experiencing infrastructure delays'.
mock_trans_default: I understand. Could you elaborate more on the specific software requirements or project timelines?
mock_exp_ja_itasu: When reporting to a boss or client, using the humble form 'itasu' sounds more professional and polite.
mock_trans_ja_progress: Thank you for the progress update. However, please make sure you detail any potential blockers. Also, I noticed a minor grammar mistake.
mock_trans_ja_database: That sounds like a backend issue. When explaining to a non-technical boss or client, you can say 'We are experiencing infrastructure delays' for easier understanding.
mock_trans_ja_default: I see. Could you elaborate a bit more on the 'specific software requirements' or 'schedules' you are focusing on?
